title: Counting People & Things
description: Learn to count people and objects in Japanese. Master the basic counters for everyday use.

title: Describing Size
description: Learn words to describe the size of things. Essential for everyday conversation.

title: Japan & Identity
description: Learn words related to Japan and Japanese identity. Basic vocabulary for introducing yourself.

title: Time & Dates
description: Master vocabulary for talking about time. Learn how to refer to today and the current year.

title: Locations & Directions
description: Learn basic location words. Essential for describing where things are.
